emails.subject: RE: MDEA revised draft
emails.body: RE: MDEA revised draft Kay The comments in the attached doc relate primarily to accrual vs. MTM accounting. They seem to be recommending repeatedly that our language covers an accrual accounting deal, and does not work for MTM accounting. Is this assumption correct, or am I missing the point? Please let me know what you think. Thanks David

emails.subject: RE: MDEA revised draft
emails.body: RE: MDEA revised draft Kay The comments in the attached doc relate primarily to accrual vs. MTM accounting. They seem to be recommending repeatedly that our language covers an accrual accounting deal, and does not work for MTM accounting. Is this assumption correct, or am I missing the point? Please let me know what you think. Thanks David

emails.subject: RE: MDEA revised draft
emails.body: I suspect they are accustomed to people wanting to structure for an MTM deal from a commercial standpoint. Doesn't sound like our objective here. ckm
